description: Content-classified shingle fingerprints of a known-good unity-doc-corpus (M0042-S6). audit --shared-baseline gates when a pinned shingle is still shared in the source HTML (ref-DF > max_shingle_df) but has collapsed in the derived Markdown (md-DF <= max_shingle_df) - a corpus-wide shared-content strip. Regenerate with --write-shared-baseline only after a human triages the change.
